subject: [PATCH v6 05/15] mm: add VM_UFFD_RWP VMA flag

2026-05-29.patch_summary: This patch adds a new VMA flag, VM_UFFD_RWP, to support userfaultfd read-write protection (RWP). RWP extends the existing write-protection mechanism to also trap read accesses through userfaultfd. The patch introduces a new flag and related helpers, but does not yet set or query the flag. It is part of a larger series that will implement full RWP functionality.
